title: pedicularis gracilituba subsp. setosa
intro: Pedicularis gracilituba subsp. setosa is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bartsia family, native to the mountainous regions of China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Pedicularis gracilituba subsp. setosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
